description_long: This is a free-standing retail display kiosk, primarily constructed from lightweight, rigid panels with a green and white color scheme. The kiosk features two open shelves for product placement and a tall back panel that extends above the shelving, serving as a prominent branding area. The uppermost section of the back panel displays the 'INSECT-O-CUTOR' logo and a large insect graphic, making the kiosk's purpose clear. The side panels are slightly angled and also display branding and product information, with hexagonal design elements for visual interest. The kiosk is open at the front for easy access to the shelves, and the rear is fully enclosed. Its compact, vertical design is suitable for placement in high-traffic urban environments such as sidewalks, store entrances, or transit stations.
description: A tall, green and white retail display kiosk with two open shelves and prominent branding on the back and side panels. The structure is lightweight, with a vertical design and open front for product access.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves, the 'INSECT-O-CUTOR' logo, and a large insect graphic on the tall back panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting angled side panel with branding and hexagonal design elements.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a fully enclosed, solid green back panel with the 'INSECT-O-CUTOR' logo.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible branding and product information on the angled panel.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the structure; logo and product branding on the upper back panel and side panels; visible text includes 'INSECT-O-CUTOR' and product information.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof formed by the top edge of the back panel, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial display with minimalist branding and geometric design elements.
